builderBoundary: FND-MECH-001 Builder defines the protocol and must not grade or claim PASS for the Clean Agent Test.

freshContextRequirement.description: The tested agent starts with no conversational history, hidden summaries, or Builder-provided explanations beyond bounded task input.

repositoryDocumentsAsSystemOfRecord.description: Repository documents are the system of record; chat text, comments, tests, filenames, generated artifacts, and donor material do not override Proofrail authority.

boundedTaskInput.description: The task input is bounded and must not smuggle additional authority, product semantics, or hidden acceptance criteria.

terminologyPreservation.description: The agent preserves canonical terms and identifies terminology authority before proposing new normative terms.

scopePreservation.description: The agent respects writable and forbidden areas and does not implement Proofrail runtime behavior when outside scope.

verificationDiscovery.description: The agent discovers expected verification commands and does not fabricate verification results.

stopConditionDiscovery.description: The agent identifies authority conflicts, trust-boundary ambiguity, product semantic changes, and forbidden runtime implementation as stop conditions.

independentGradingBoundary: A separate fresh-context agent or equivalent independent review process must grade the Clean Agent Test.
